36545650.fa: Guest editor, is an assistant professor of neurology at Cleveland Clinic Lerner College of Medicine and a staff member at Cleveland Clinic's Mellen Center for Multiple Sclerosis. She has published over 20 peer-reviewed articles in the field of MS and telehealth. Her current research focuses on using technology to facilitate distance health care and on using real-time data streams in clinical trials and routine clinical care
